// operators: and

// comparison: prec(4, ...)
// operators: ==, !=, <, >, <=, >=

// range: prec(5, ...)
// operators: .., ..=

// additive: prec.left(6, ...)
// operators: +, -, ++

// multiplicative: prec.left(7, ...)
// operators: *, /, %

// power: prec.right(8, ...)
// operators: ^

// unary: prec.right(9, ...)
// operators: -, not
